nasb.text: For He rescued us from the domain of darkness, and transferred us to the kingdom of His beloved Son,

esv.text: He has delivered us from the domain of darkness and transferred us to the kingdom of his beloved Son,

cnv.text: 他救我們脫離了黑暗的權勢，把我們遷入他愛子的國裡。

ccb.text: 祂把我们从黑暗的权势下拯救出来，带进祂爱子的国度里。

csbs.text: 他救我们脱离了黑暗的权势，把我们迁入他爱子的国度；
